name: @wachsam/v02
description: WachSam Backend-App (v0.3) — Next.js 15 + Postgres + Drizzle. Löst v01/ nach Cutover-Welle W1.7 ab.

scripts.test:unit: tsx web/lib/personalization.test.ts && tsx web/lib/household-check.test.ts && tsx web/lib/household-costs.test.ts && tsx web/lib/onboarding.test.ts && tsx web/lib/price-radar.test.ts && tsx web/lib/public-data.test.ts && tsx web/lib/editorial.test.ts && tsx web/lib/feedback.test.ts && tsx web/lib/rate-limit.test.ts && tsx web/lib/same-origin.test.ts && tsx web/lib/sparkline.test.ts && tsx web/lib/themes.test.ts && tsx web/lib/regions.test.ts && tsx web/lib/cost-model.test.ts && tsx web/lib/weekly.test.ts
scripts.verify: cd web && tsc --noEmit && eslint . --max-warnings 0 && next build && cd ../db && drizzle-kit generate && tsx scripts/seed.ts --dry-run && cd .. && tsx scripts/audit-invariants.test.ts && tsx scripts/editorial-cli.test.ts && tsx scripts/operator-role.test.ts && tsx web/lib/personalization.test.ts && tsx web/lib/household-check.test.ts && tsx web/lib/household-costs.test.ts && tsx web/lib/onboarding.test.ts && tsx web/lib/price-radar.test.ts && tsx web/lib/public-data.test.ts && tsx web/lib/editorial.test.ts && tsx web/lib/feedback.test.ts && tsx web/lib/rate-limit.test.ts && tsx web/lib/same-origin.test.ts && tsx web/lib/sparkline.test.ts && tsx web/lib/themes.test.ts && tsx web/lib/regions.test.ts && tsx web/lib/cost-model.test.ts && tsx web/lib/weekly.test.ts
